transcript.text:
[I've stolen from the ocean]
I won't fit, right?
Hello everyone~
Today
Braised seafood since I'm in Yokji Island
I bought some seafood
Let's go ahead and cook
This is the octopus broth
It's broth
Gigantic comb pen shell
Abalone
Right, I'm supposed to steam it but I put it in the broth...
So that it cooks faster
My hands smell
[Chat: Close the lid] Really?
[Chat: If you close the lid, the food will be too fishy] So do I close it or open it?

Leave it open?
Isn't this ready? Shrimp gets cooked pretty fast
This looks good, right?
[Chat: Take it out if you're going to stir-fry it] Yes I am. Okay
Let's get some oil on it first
This gives the smokey flavor
This is a load of seafood
Stir-fry
Tzuyang's braised seafood has no vegetables
[Chat: Is this right..?] I'm not sure either
[Chat: That doesn't look like braised seafood] Yes it does
Webfoot octopus! I forgot about it
Come here
Where did my webfoot octopus go?
There you are!
It's complete

It's still boiling
It looks so good
I will give some to my workers
I can eat all of this and still be hungry, but
Bon appetit
Let me wipe some of my sweat
It's too hot
You have gochujang paste on your face On my face?
Really?
No it's not
Right there
Oh, you're right
It looks better than expected
Can I turn the fire off?
[Chat: Turn the fan on] Fan? Nah it's fine
That's going to blow my hair Bon appetit!

I've been wanting to eat this octopus
Seasoned octopus
The seasoning is so good
Remember when you guys told me to slightly cook the octopus last time and it was too chewy?
This needs to be boiled for at least 20 minutes
Now it's super tender
You guys lied to me
Scallop
Take a big one out
The meat is huge
It melts in my mouth
It's so good Can I just eat it with gloves?
Will it be too hot?
Shrimp Really big, right?
Snap it in half, start with the head
Get some sauce on it

Big clam
This is the red scallop
There are a few in here, but they're small
So good
Intestines
Snap
It didn't work
I need to use scissors
That's nice
I'm so happy
This one is big too
Big ones are the way to go
Shush!
It stopped
This happened last time too
The sauce is delicious

[Chat: Did you finish all the abalone?]
I have them here I forgot to eat it! It's this right now
Abalone
Cut the intestines
Cut it in half
Half of it is bigger than a normal abalone
This won't fit in 1 bite
So good
There's a webfoot octopus hiding in here
That's so tender
[Chat: Which is better? Octopus or Webfoot?] I like the webfoot octopus more
It's really tender
I got a mosquito bite already So many of them here
So itchy
[Chat: Shake while you eat] Like this?
So tender

Mosquitos
Help me
I cooked them for a long time, but they're still good
Abalone
Half of it
The sauce is great
It's like a spicy stir-fried squid Like seafood with sauce
Hello
You're doing mukbang?
That looks so good
What bring you here?
I have pepper kimchi to give you
I saw the smoke from far away
I thought you were barbequing
That's why I brought this so you can eat it with meat
Do you want some?

Stop disrupting her and come
Thank you very much
I have a lot of food, come take some No, it doesn't look enough for you
No no no it's okay take some Where are you going?
Thank you
[She doesn't like chili peppers] Thank you!
I... I like it
It's good
Not spicy
I will give some to our PD
[Chat: Sauce on your chin]
Is it still there? Where?
Just continue
Let's open a comb pen shell
That took some effort
Look at this thing

These can get a little too tough to chew So it's best to cut it up
If you eat too much at once
So cut them into pieces
Put some sauce on it
I have to give him this too
[If there's any left]
So good
I was going to share, but I ate it all
[Chat: Time for fried rice?] I don't have rice. No need for it for seafood
I don't like rice that much
Even with sidedishes Maybe like 3 bowls of rice?
Snap the lobster
It has red intestines and eggs
Do you guys see the red eggs?
Well in that case,
Get the spine

Take that out
It's filled with eggs
You were preggo
It's all over my gloves
I'm going to act like I took it out of the shell
I need to cut this I can't eat it in 1 bite
No, right?
My shirt became dirty
Do I need to change?
Change after the mukbang?
It won't wash off later
[Chat: You'll get the new shirt dirty anyway] Okay, I'll change after I eat
You guys don't care about my shirt!
I'll go wash it
These are all empty
I want to wash the sauce off It's salty and spicy

Salty
What is that? Broth
From where?
I just cooked it
[Suspicious]
It's too cold to be have been made "just now"
Was it in the refrigerator?
I'll wash it off now
But I ate everything already There's not much left
Done
Done
I'm too lazy to eat this lobster
I wish someone picked out the meat for me
That would be really nice
I will give these to my workers
[Chat: Let's eat some fried rice and go to heaven] Rice? Nope

It's salty
If I eat more, my body will go into a seizure from a sodium overdose
I ran out of all the drinks
No more potion
Last scallop
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
